cards.draft: LAW: assert at the SYSTEM layer - every new wire ships with one synthetic event pushed through the WHOLE pipe before it is reported built.
cards.evidence: June 12: the gold wire shipped "built" while severed x3 (schema key, renderer key, rating gate) - every component test was green; one fake approval through mint->renderer exposed all three in minutes (assert_gold_wire.py now standing in make_sure). Chair rated the day 2/5 for this.
cards.proposed_action: permanent rule in CLAUDE.md + every future wire gets its assert_<wire>.py in make_sure

cards.draft: LAW: the judge sees the FULL POST - occasion, idea, visual plan, reasoning, then the caption; verdicts collected with hidden context are quarantined and never train.
cards.evidence: June 12: judge cards v1 truncated the occasion (slot[:40]) - Mohamed approved an Eid day-of caption blind; his own words within minutes: "i need to see the photo the ocassion and the idea and the resinning behind the full post not the captions". 5 verdicts quarantined (data/verdict_quarantine.json).
cards.proposed_action: already enforced (judge cards v2 + blind-quarantine in scorecards/gold); crystallize as permanent law

cards.draft: LAW: no candidate (client, brand, handle, account) is shown to Mohamed without LIVE verification - corpus-derived identity is untrusted until checked against the real world.
cards.evidence: June 12: 5/5 pilot shortlist candidates failed live checks - 3 handles had leading characters stripped by the xlsx ingestion (lnasser->alnasser), 1 restricted, 1 was a SOUTH AFRICAN brand wearing .sa. Root: accounts layer is part-synthetic (sub_category_template provenance). Shortlist rebuilt verified-only + verify_shortlist.py standing.
cards.proposed_action: permanent rule + the 110-handle live verification sweep (staged, cheap Apify)

cards.draft: LAW: every surface Mohamed reads speaks HUMAN - plain words, no system nouns; a card he cannot understand is a defect equal to a broken button.
cards.evidence: June 12, his note verbatim: "I dont understand try to explain to human not ai" - sent while facing jargon cards. Cards rewritten in plain words; his tap-rate resumed immediately after.
cards.proposed_action: permanent rule in CLAUDE.md: card copy in his words, tested by reading aloud

cards.draft: LAW: a CLI is tested through the CLI - a tool whose command line exits 0 while writing nothing is the worst class of failure and hides from function-level tests.
cards.evidence: June 12: issue_log CLI argparse dest collision made "verify" a silent no-op (exit 0, zero bytes) - survived a 50-assert harness because the harness called functions, never the CLI. Caught only because the issue state refused to move. CLI smoke now in the harness (51/51).
cards.proposed_action: harness rule: every CLI gets one subprocess smoke

cards.draft: LAW: Mac-required actions NEVER close on self-report — only the machine's own evidence closes them (auto-close when the check turns green).
cards.evidence: June 12, twice in one evening: plist card closed on "done" / "all_good" taps from his PHONE while launchctl showed 0/3 in every domain; the second verify-command was itself gamed by Apple siri services matching the word "orchestrator". v4 card has no self-report buttons; make_sure reboot_proofed check (exact labels, gui/501) auto-closes on real evidence.
cards.proposed_action: permanent card-design rule + the reboot_proofed pattern for every future machine-gated action
